title: Scientists Found Fossil Pollen That Revealed a Hidden Nile Channel That Helped Build the Great Pyramid
description: Beneath the dry sands surrounding the Great Pyramid, scientists discovered traces of a forgotten waterway that has almost completely vanished.

title: Eva v Goliath: the 20-year-old climate activist taking on Trump and the fossil fuel industry
description: Young Americans are suing the president for violating rights with executive orders that fuel the climate crisis Eva Lighthiser was at a dorm party on her Colorado college campus last month when she had to call it an early night. “I said, ‘Hey, I’ve got to go to bed, I’m flying out to Portland tomorrow,’ and then of course follow-up questions get raised,” she said. “I’m like, ‘Well, it’s a lot to explain.’” Continue reading...

title: How 24/7 Renewables Are Ending Fossil Fuel Reliability
description: IRENA analysis shows solar and wind paired with storage now deliver 24/7 power cheaper than coal and gas. As battery costs drop, renewables are replacing fossil fuels.

title: In 1901, construction workers found a rich Roman coffin that proved ancient Britain was highly diverse
description: A remarkable discovery in York, England, challenged historical assumptions about Roman Britain. Analysis of a noblewoman's tooth enamel revealed she originated from North Africa, not Britain. This finding proves the Roman Empire was a diverse and mobile civilization, with York being a cosmopolitan hub. Her story rewrites national history, highlighting ancient global connections.
